use_cases: Standard interactive button with multiple visual variants for SaaS applications
Accessible form submission button with keyboard navigation for fintech products
Navigation action button with ghost styling for creator-tools
Primary CTA button for dev-tools dashboards
ai_summary: A reusable button component built on Radix UI primitives with CVA (class-variance-authority) for flexible styling. Supports 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options including icon button. Includes full accessibility support via focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling, making it a foundational atomic component for any UI system.
